news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems surged 14.5%, hitting ₹238.2 on NSE after successful limpet mine trials.
Stock rose 20% in a week, remains 27% below 52-week high; one-year return at 122%.
news.summary:
Apollo Micro Systems surged 14.5%, hitting ₹238.2 on NSE after successful limpet mine trials.
Stock rose 20% in a week, remains 27% below 52-week high; one-year return at 122%.

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems completes blast trials for Limpet mines for Indian Navy.
The news update lacks detailed analysis and market commentary.
news.summary:

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems completed blast trials for limpet mines for naval defense.
The company is India's sole developer of these mines, enhancing underwater warfare capabilities.
news.summary:
Apollo Micro Systems completed blast trials for limpet mines for naval defense.
The company is India's sole developer of these mines, enhancing underwater warfare capabilities.

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems completes successful Limpet mines blast trials, boosting its underwater electronic warfare business.
It is the only Indian company supplying Limpet mines to the Indian Navy.
news.summary:
Apollo Micro Systems completes successful Limpet mines blast trials, boosting its underwater electronic warfare business.
It is the only Indian company supplying Limpet mines to the Indian Navy.

news.title: Motilal Oswal Mutual Fund bought 18,02,572 shares of Apollo Micro Systems Ltd at an avg price of ₹189.6.
news.summary: Motilal Oswal Mutual Fund bought 18,02,572 shares of Apollo Micro Systems Ltd at an avg price of ₹189.6.

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems issued 28.9 lakh shares on a preferential basis at Rs.114, including Rs.113 premium.
Shares will trade from 19th March 2026 and remain locked until 19th September 2026.
news.summary:
Apollo Micro Systems issued 28.9 lakh shares on a preferential basis at Rs.114, including Rs.113 premium.
Shares will trade from 19th March 2026 and remain locked until 19th September 2026.

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems projects 45-50% revenue CAGR over next 3 years, supported by strong order book and greenfield expansion.
Shares fell 3% to Rs. 195.15 on Monday; reported Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs. 252 crore, up 70% YoY, with a Rs. 1,305 crore order book.
news.summary:
Apollo Micro Systems projects 45-50% revenue CAGR over next 3 years, supported by strong order book and greenfield expansion.
Shares fell 3% to Rs. 195.15 on Monday; reported Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs. 252 crore, up 70% YoY, with a Rs. 1,305 crore order book.

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems will present its Dec 2025 quarter investor presentation during the analyst meet on Mar 13, 2026.
The presentation is available on the company's website and complies with SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.
news.summary:
Apollo Micro Systems will present its Dec 2025 quarter investor presentation during the analyst meet on Mar 13, 2026.
The presentation is available on the company's website and complies with SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems Ltd announces investor meetings on March 12, 2026 with Jefferies and Goldman Sachs in Hyderabad.
Earnings presentation and public info will be shared; no UPSI to be discussed during interactions.
news.summary:
Apollo Micro Systems Ltd announces investor meetings on March 12, 2026 with Jefferies and Goldman Sachs in Hyderabad.
Earnings presentation and public info will be shared; no UPSI to be discussed during interactions.

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems secures orders worth INR 733.3 Mn, including INR 150 Mn from DRDO.
DPSU orders total INR 435 Mn, covering missile launchers and cyber security systems.
news.summary:
Apollo Micro Systems secures orders worth INR 733.3 Mn, including INR 150 Mn from DRDO.
DPSU orders total INR 435 Mn, covering missile launchers and cyber security systems.

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems' Q3 FY25 net sales rose 35.3% Y-o-Y to Rs. 200.8 crore.
Net profit increased 66.2% Y-o-Y to Rs. 30.7 crore; shares gained 104.8% in 12 months.
news.summary:
Apollo Micro Systems' Q3 FY25 net sales rose 35.3% Y-o-Y to Rs. 200.8 crore.
Net profit increased 66.2% Y-o-Y to Rs. 30.7 crore; shares gained 104.8% in 12 months.

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems Ltd informed that the Q3FY2026 Investor Presentation will be reused.
No new presentation is created; the existing one is on the company's website.
news.summary:
Apollo Micro Systems Ltd informed that the Q3FY2026 Investor Presentation will be reused.

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems posted strong December 2025 results with revenue growth and profitability.
Despite rising interest costs, its outlook shifted from very positive to positive amid margin pressures.
news.summary:
Apollo Micro Systems posted strong December 2025 results with revenue growth and profitability.
Despite rising interest costs, its outlook shifted from very positive to positive amid margin pressures.

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems plans Rs.150 crore Hardware Park expansion.
The company targets 45-50% CAGR with the new project.
news.summary:
Apollo Micro Systems plans Rs.150 crore Hardware Park expansion.
The company targets 45-50% CAGR with the new project.

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems posts record Q3 FY26 revenue, completes IDL Explosives acquisition.
Allotted land in Telangana, signs MoU with Navy & IIT Chennai for defence tech.
news.summary:
Apollo Micro Systems posts record Q3 FY26 revenue, completes IDL Explosives acquisition.
Allotted land in Telangana, signs MoU with Navy & IIT Chennai for defence tech.

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹533M from ₹380M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 26.5% from 25.6% YoY.
news.summary:
Apollo Micro Systems' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹533M from ₹380M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 26.5% from 25.6% YoY.

news.title:
Apollo's Q3 net profit rose 43% to ₹310 crore, revenue up 7.1% to ₹5,815 crore.
EBITDA increased 36% to ₹472 crore, with margins improving to 8% from 6.4% YoY.
news.summary:
Apollo's Q3 net profit rose 43% to ₹310 crore, revenue up 7.1% to ₹5,815 crore.
EBITDA increased 36% to ₹472 crore, with margins improving to 8% from 6.4% YoY.

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems allotted 22,988 sq.m land in Hyderabad for ₹27.6 crore.
Plans ₹300 crore investment for manufacturing weapon systems, boosting defence tech.
news.summary:
Apollo Micro Systems allotted 22,988 sq.m land in Hyderabad for ₹27.6 crore.
Plans ₹300 crore investment for manufacturing weapon systems, boosting defence tech.

news.title:
Apollo Micro Systems lists 1.21 crore equity shares of Rs.1 each from Jan 9, 2026.
Shares issued at Rs.113 premium; lock-in period extends till July 2026/2027.
news.summary:
